headline: Assessing Crown Castle (CCI) Valuation After Recent Tower Focus And Share Price Moves
summary: Why Crown Castle is on investors’ radar today Crown Castle (CCI) is drawing fresh attention after recent share price moves, with the stock up about 2% over the past day and roughly 4% over the past month. See our latest analysis for Crown Castle. That 2.1% 1 day share price return and 4.5% 30 day share price return sit against a flat year to date share price return and a 10.3% decline in 1 year total shareholder return. This suggests that recent momentum contrasts with weaker longer term...
